title: Vandavāsi Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Vandavāsi with a Z-Score of +3.14. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Vandavāsi is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 80%, and the wind speed is 13.5 km/h, making the conditions even more unbearable. 
 The absence of any heating degree days (HDD=0.0 GG) indicates that the focus is solely on cooling, which will put a strain on the city's resources.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
